titleStmt.title: SII 9.641: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 641. (A.R. No. 85 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Phālguṇa, śu. 5 corresponding to A.D. 1551 February 11, wednesday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśiva-Mahārāya ruling at Vidyānagara. It records that Heḷavi-Nāyaka, son of Chāmi-Nāyaka of Bāguḷi, in the sub-division of Koṭūra-sīme which had been granted to Haḍapada-Kṛishṇappa-Nāyaka, exempted the shepherds of Bāguḷi and its hamlets from tax on their sheep. Koṭūra-sīme is stated to have been situated in Kōgaḷi-vēṇṭhe which was a subdivision of Pāṇḍya-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śōbhanamastu . svasti śrī
jayādbhudayaśālivāhanaṣakhavarṣa
1472 neya sādhāraṇasaṁvatsarada
phālguṇa śu 5 milu śrīmattu (.) rājādhirā
ja rājaparamēśvara śrīvirāpratāpa śrī
sadāśivamahārāyaru vidyānaga
radoḷu ratnasiṁhāsanāṟūḍharāgi
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁda rājyaṁge
yutta(ṁ)miralu . Ā sadāśivarā
yaru haḍapada kṛṣṇappanāyakarige
koṭṭa koṭūra sīmege saluva bāgu
ḷiya cāmināyakara maga heḷavinā
yakarū bāguḷiya kumakara basavigauṁḍa
na maga liṁgagoṁḍa muṁtāda kuṟuba gauḍa
gaḷige kuṟideṟige yillā Eṁdu biṭṭu koṭṭa śā
na hastināvatiya vaḷitada pāṁḍyadanāḍa vaḷagaṇa
kōgaḷiya vēṁṭheyake saluva koṭṭūru sīme
ya voḷagaṇa bāguḷiya grāma 1 Ā grāmakke saluva
kāluvaḷigaḷu muṁtāda grāmōpagrāmaṁ
gaḷalu yihaṁtā kuṟigaḷige teṟi
ge yillā Eṁdu biṭṭa dharmaśāsana .
Digital edition of SII 9.641 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
